query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplierName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.dataSource,
  c.name as customerName,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  ROUND(s.monthlyCost - s.monthlyRevenue, 2) as monthlyLoss
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0 
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100 < 0
ORDER BY marginPct ASC;

SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplierName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.dataSource,
  c.name as customerName,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  ROUND(s.monthlyCost - s.monthlyRevenue, 2) as monthlyLoss
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0 
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100 < 0
ORDER BY marginPct ASC;
